No. Existing Amended (1) (2) (3) 1 Statutes 13 Nine members of the Academic Council shall form the quorum for a meeting of the Academic Council. Half of the total members of the Academic Council excluding the Chairman shall form the quorum for the meeting of the Academic Council. 2 Statutes 14 (a) & (d) As such Statutes 14 (i) Not existing No change 1. The Academic Council shall consist of the following members namely : i. the Vice Chancellor ii. the Pro Vice Chancellor iii. the Deans of School iv. the Dean of Students Welfare v. Proctor vi. Controller of Examination vii. Registrar shall be Ex-Officio Secretary. -- 2 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIIμ[k.M 4º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 viii. the Librarian ix. All Head of Departments of the University which are not included in clause (ii) to (iv). x. three Professors, three Associate Professors & three Assistant Professors by rotation in order of their seniority for one year. xi. two Principals of affiliated Colleges by rotation in order of their seniority in substantive capacity as Principal, out of which one Principal shall be nominated from Government Colleges affiliated to this University for one year. xii. two members elected by the Court for the period of three years. He/She shall not be eligible for reappointment. xiii. five eminent academicians not being in the service of the University to nominated by the Visitor for a period of three years. xiv. Five persons not in the service of the University co-opted by the Academic Council for their special knowledge in educational progress and development. Prof. P.S. Ldwy ds rhu ladk;k/;{k tks ofj"Brk ds vk/kkj ij pØkuqØe esa pqus tk,axsA iv. gseorh uUnu cgqxq.kk x<+oky fo'ofo|ky; ls lEc) ljdkjh@ljdkjh lgk;rk izkIr egkfo|ky; dk ,d izkpk;Z] izkpk;Z ds :i esa LFkk;h fu;qfDr ds vk/kkj ij tks -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] ofj"Brk vuqlkj pØkuqØe eas p;fur fd;k tk;sxkA v. pØh; Øe esa] ofj”Brk ds vk/kkj ij p;fur ,d izksQslj] ,d ,lksfl,V izksQslj rFkk ,d ,fllVsaV izksQsljA vi. dksVZ }kjk fuokZfpr ,d lnL;] og iqufuZ;qfDr ds fy, vgZ ugha gksxkA vii. dqykf/kifr }kjk ukfer ,d O;fDrA viii. foftVj }kjk ukfer pkj O;fDrA ix. fo'ofo|ky; vuqnku vk;ksx ds v/;{k }kjk ukfer ,d O;fDrA x. lfpo] mPp f’k{kk ekuo lalk/ku fodkl ea=ky; ds }kjk ukfer ,d O;fDrA 2- dk;Zifj”kn~ ds lnL;ksa dk dk;Zdky rhu o"kZ dk gksxkA 3- dksbZ lnL; ,d le; esa ,d ls vf/kd :Ik esa dk;Zifj”kn~ dk lnL; ugha gksxkA 4- v/;{k ds vfrfjDr dk;Zifj”kn~ ds vk/ks lnL;ksa dh mifLFkfr] ftuesa nks lnL; foftVj }kjk euksuhr lnL; gksaxs] x.kiwfrZ ekuh tk,xhA 5- dqylfpo insu lfpo gksaxsA 6- vxj mi /kkjk ¼iii½] ¼iv½ vkSj ¼v½ esa dk;ZHkkj xzg.k dh frfFk ,d gh gS rks ofj"Brk tUe frfFk ds vk/kkj ij r; dh tk,xh] vFkkZr~ ftldh tUe&frfFk igys gksxh] og ofj"B ekuk tk,xkA izks- ih- ,l- jk.kk] dqylfpo [foKkiu III@4@vlk/kj.k@362-,@13] Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University, Srinagar Garhwal, Uttarakhand (A Central University) NOTIFICATION NO- HNBGU/RO/2013/448 SRINAGAR, the 14th May 2013 Amendment to Statute 11 and 12 of the Central Universities Act, 2009 Sl. No. Existing Amended (1) (2) (3) 1 Statutes 11 Seven members of the Executive Council shall form the quorum for a meeting of the Half of the total members of the Executive Council excluding the Chairman shall form the quorum for the meeting of the Executive Council out of which two members shall be from among the visitor’s nominee. -- 4 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIIμ[k.M 4º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 Executive Council. 2 Statutes 12 (1) & (2) As such Statutes 12 (3) Not existing No Change 1. The Executive Council shall consist of the following members: i. the Vice Chancellor ii. the Pro Vice Chancellor iii. three Deans of the School to be selected by rotation in order of seniority. iv. one Principal from Govt./Govt. aided colleges affiliated with HNBGU to be selected by rotation in order of seniority in substantive capacity as Principal. v. one Professor, one Associate Professor and one Assistant Professor to be selected by rotation on the basis of seniority. vi. one member elected by the Court. He/She shall not be eligible for reappointment. vii. one person to be nominated by the Chancellor. viii. four persons to be nominated by the visitor. ix. One person to be nominated by the Chairman, UGC. x. One person to be nominated by the Secretary, Higher Education, MHRD. 2. the members of the Executive Council should hold office for a term of three years. 3. at a time no person shall continue to be a member of the Executive Council in more than one capacity. 4. Half of the total members of the Executive Council excluding the Chairman shall form the quorum for the meeting of the Executive Council out of which two members shall be from among the visitor’s nominee. 5. Registrar shall act as Ex-Officio Secretary 6. In case of Sub-Clause (iii), (iv) and (v) if the date of joining is the same, the seniority will be decided by date of birth i.e. the person having earlier date of birth being senior. Prof. P.S. RANA , Registrar [ADVT. III/4/Exty./362-A/13] Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 5 of 5 --
